arts.ttl: Why Sverre Nypan could only cost Arsenal £900,000 of their allocated January transfer budget
Arsenal tipped to sign Brazil’s BEST No.9
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have already been rejected by Igor Jesus, but South American football expert Tim Vickery has tipped Arsenal to be more successful in their pursuit of the 23-year-old if they make a move. Arsenal have been tipped to make a move for Botafogo striker Igor Jesus before the transfer window concludes.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal lead Chelsea in Mathys Tel transfer race as Bayern Munich 'surprise' Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal appear to have dented Chelsea's hopes of signing Mathys Tel before the January transfer window slams shut on Monday evening. football.london understands Chelsea did not, however, discuss or offer Christopher Nkunku as part of a swap deal despite Bayern's interest.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa believe they can persuade £10m player to join them instead of Arsenal before deadline day
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has tried to convince the 18-year-old to join Arsenal 🤯

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham Target 'Wants to Join Man Utd'
arts.sum: Man Utd are reportedly interested in signing Mathys Tel, and insider Paul O Keefe has said he favours an Old Trafford move over Arsenal or Tottenham.

arts.ttl: “Already making contacts” – Fabrizio Romano’s exciting update on Arsenal & Liverpool transfer target
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool fans may be intrigued to see an update this afternoon from transfer journalist Fabrizio Romano. Although Romano doesn’t specifically mention the Gunners or the Reds, he has said that Premier League clubs are already making contacts over signing highly-rated young Ajax defender Jorrel Hato ahead of the summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target set to cost €70million
arts.sum: Real Sociedad are reportedly set to demand as much as €70million for the transfer of Arsenal target Martin Zubimendi this summer. It already looks like the Zubimendi to Arsenal deal is advanced ahead of next season, but it could still be that there are some details to work out. arts.ttl: Arsenal defender Ayden Heaven set to turn down contract offer and join Manchester United
arts.sum: Heaven made his senior debut for Arsenal in the Carabao Cup earlier this season

arts.ttl: £105m cut-off no issue for Liverpool and Arsenal as FSG and KSE set budgets ahead of deadline day
Myles Lewis-Skelly still the real villain in Arsenal controversy despite FA U-turn
arts.sum: The FA's independent commission decided that the referee had been wrong to send off Arsenal's midfielder for cynically fouling Matt Doherty in the game at Wolves last Saturday
